name: Affix
description: Pins an element to the viewport edge as the user scrolls.

api.name: Affix
api.description: Pins an element to the viewport edge as the user scrolls.

examples.title: Basic Affix
examples.code: This content sticks at 80px from top.

examples.title: Interactive: Anchor & Offset
examples.code:
@* Top anchor *@
<Affix OffsetTop="80">
    <Badge Class="px-4 py-1.5 text-sm shadow">Affixed — Top 80px</Badge>
</Affix>

@* Bottom anchor *@
<Affix OffsetBottom="40">
    <Badge Class="px-4 py-1.5 text-sm shadow">Affixed — Bottom 40px</Badge>
</Affix>

mdSummary:
# Affix

Pins an element to the viewport edge as the user scrolls.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/affix

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Affix | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Affix | OffsetTop | `int` | `0` |  |
| Affix | OffsetBottom | `int?` | `` |  |
| Affix | Target | `string?` | `` |  |
| Affix | OnChange | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Affix | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Affix | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Affix) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnChange` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Affix />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Affix/Affix.razor`
